entries.title: overhaul changelog/update sheet and state model
entries.description:
Replace the flat Callout card with a centered SoftBlobBadge for error and
rate-limit states, matching the up-to-date visual language. Section badges now
use surfaceContainerLowest/onSurface for misc types to avoid blending into the
card background. What's New icon changed to NewReleases (outlined).

Remove dead fields from FeatureSheetItem (icon, isBreaking), dead sealed
variant UpdateSheetState.LatestUnknown, and the redundant dragHandle default.
Merge FailedOffline + FailedNetwork into a single Failed(cause, cachedFallback)
to eliminate four duplicate when-branches across three files.

Add ServiceUnavailable to FailureCause for 5xx responses. Handle HTTP 429
secondary rate limits with Retry-After delta header. Show IP rate-limit context
below the rate-limit badge. Simplify ChangelogSheet sheetState derivation and
latestVersionForMatch.
